meanings.definition: make a compromise; arrive at a compromise
examples: nobody will get everything he wants; we all must compromise

meanings.definition: expose or make liable to danger, suspicion, or disrepute
examples: The nuclear secrets of the state were compromised by the spy

meanings.definition: making or willing to make concessions
examples: loneliness tore through him...whenever he thought of...even the compromising Louis du Tillet

meanings.definition: vulnerable to danger especially of discredit or suspicion
examples: she found herself in a compromising situation
